description: You are a fleet manager researching electric vehicles for a corporate fleet upgrade. Research the 2024 Tesla Model 3 Long Range, 2024 Hyundai IONIQ 5 Long Range AWD, and 2024 Ford F-150 Lightning 4WD Extended Range on fueleconomy.gov to find their EPA Combined Range (miles), 5-year fuel cost savings compared to the average new vehicle, and Federal Tax Credit eligibility status/amount. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'EV Fleet Candidates' containing the detail pages for each vehicle. Save the findings to ~/Documents/ev_fleet_analysis.json using keys 'tesla_model_3_lr', 'hyundai_ioniq_5_awd', and 'ford_lightning_ext', with each containing 'epa_range_miles', 'five_year_savings_usd', and 'tax_credit_amount'.
